title: Package Setup & Configuration

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Human installing and configuring the package in a Laravel application

actors.name: Laravel Application
actors.description: The host Laravel app that loads the service provider via auto-discovery

actors.name: Artisan CLI
actors.description: Laravel's CLI used to publish assets and generate boilerplate

use_cases.name: Register Service Provider
details: Merges config/ai.php into application config under key 'ai'

use_cases.name: Bootstrap Package Services
details: Registers console commands when running in console
Registers publishable resources when running in console

use_cases.name: Publish Database Migrations
details: Copies database/migrations/* to application's database/migrations directory

use_cases.name: Configure AI Providers
details: Configure caching for embeddings (store, enabled flag)

use_cases.name: Select AI Provider
use_cases.trigger: Add provider entry in config/ai.php 'providers' array
details: Supported drivers: anthropic, azure, cohere, deepseek, eleven, gemini, groq, jina, mistral, ollama, openai, openrouter, voyageai, xai
Each provider requires: driver key + API key (env var) + optional url/deployment fields

use_cases.name: Resolve Provider via Facade
use_cases.trigger: Ai::textProvider() / Ai::embeddingProvider() etc. in application code
use_cases.implementation: Ai facade → getFacadeAccessor() returns AiManager::class → IoC resolves scoped AiManager

key_relationships: Developer includes UC3 (Publish Config) before UC6 (Configure Providers)
Developer includes UC4 (Publish Migrations) before running migrations
UC1 (Register) extends UC2 (Bootstrap) — register always precedes boot
UC9 (Resolve Facade) depends_on UC1 (Register) and UC7 (Select Provider)
AiServiceProvider registers AiManager; Ai facade delegates to AiManager
AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager — supports named provider instances
ConversationStore bound to DatabaseConversationStore (requires UC4 migrations)
important_notes: AiManager is registered as 'scoped' (per-request lifecycle). Lab enum can be used as driver value (resolved via ->value). Prism gateway also exists (PrismGateway imported) but no create method seen. Stringable and Collection macros registered at boot for embedding/reranking convenience.
